name: Morning Brew
tagline: Kailua's beloved bohemian coffeehouse — strong wifi, all-day breakfast, 100% Hawaiian-roasted coffee.
parking: Parking in the Kailua Shopping Center lot — free and usually easy
talkStory: Founded by Jim Wayman, a Kailua local who wanted a true community coffeehouse for the Windward side. He sources 100% Hawaiian-grown beans and is usually behind the counter — ask him about the latest roast and he’ll talk your ear off in the best way. The honey macadamia nut latte is the signature drink and has a devoted following. Weekend mornings are packed with post-surf and post-beach regulars. Great WiFi and outlets make this one of the best remote work spots on the Windward side.
